info.title: FERN Frontend Surface
info.description: Source-derived OpenAPI contract for the current frontend-facing gateway surface. It includes endpoints actively used by the frontend app or intentionally exposed for frontend diagnostics. It excludes internal control-plane routes, but now includes the auth session lifecycle, shared paged staff list envelopes with total-count metadata, the stock-safe sales, payroll, and procurement actions already exercised by the frontend, the dedicated cashier POS workspace at exact /pos built on existing protected sales and product endpoints, the protected non-cashier staff order queue at exact /order, and the public customer ordering plus public order-status flow under /api/v1/sales/public.

post.summary: Logout and revoke the active session

200.description: Session inventory for the authenticated user

post.summary: Revoke a session owned by the authenticated user

get.summary: List outlet prices effective on a date
List work shifts by user and date window
List work shifts by outlet and date

post.summary: Create a cashier or staff order
Approve a public customer order through the legacy confirm route
Approve an order and consume inventory
Capture payment and finalize an approved order

get.summary: List ordering tables for cashier client-order links
List public menu items for an ordering table
Read a submitted public customer order

200.description: Public order receipt and current status

BadRequest.description: Request validation or malformed body error

Forbidden.description: Authenticated but not allowed to access the requested scope

Conflict.description: Request conflicts with the current business state
